name: Save Project State
description: Save current task and project state for clean session resumption. Workflow-agnostic — detects project structure and updates all relevant state-tracking artifacts.
content:
Save the current task and project state so I can return in a later session with minimal lost context.

Determine the relevant workflow, project structure, and state-tracking files based on the current project or workspace. Do not assume a specific workflow — adapt to whatever is present.

Update the current project state, session information, and any relevant supporting files such as README, card.md, workflow notes, or other state-tracking documents. Capture current progress, key decisions, open questions, blockers, next steps, and anything else needed for a clean restart.

Explicitly prepare the project so I can continue this exact task in my next session. The goal is that when I come back, the model can quickly understand what I was doing, what matters, and what should happen next.
